packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.name: defaultOpen
packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.description: Initial open state for uncontrolled usage.

packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.description: When true, renders the trigger without a tooltip.

packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.name: onOpenChange

packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.name: sideOffset
packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.description: Gap between the trigger and bubble, in px.

packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.name: closeDelay

packages/react/src/components/Tooltip/To.description: Default delay before opening, in ms, for descendant tooltips.
